title: Odin.Fun - Rekt
relevance_summary: Liquidity manipulation attack using worthless tokens to inflate prices and drain real assets

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deposits worthless tokens followed by a price manipulation and withdrawal of real assets in the same transaction.
prevention.trigger: DEPOSIT_WORTHLESS_TOKENS -> PRICE_MANIPULATION -> WITHDRAW_REAL_ASSETS in single tx

summary: Hackers manipulated Odin.Fun's AMM by depositing worthless tokens, inflating prices, and withdrawing real Bitcoin, costing users $7 million. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting deposits of worthless tokens followed by price manipulation and subsequent withdrawal of real assets.
